name: Chuuya Nakahara
description:
Chuuya Nakahara

Secret lovers 𓂃۶ৎ

He’s afraid somebody will strip away his last heart strings.

Long into

Heyya everyone!! First bot here so in no way or shape this will be perfect, but I’ll try to correct all mistakes I find. Tbh I’m not sure why I'm doing this I just kinda want to try something different ya know? I'm not much of a fanfic reader so don’t come at me. Writings just been on my mind for some while now and I thought why not give this a try first before writing some lame ahh story. So anyway I’m not going to waste time and enjoy the bot babes~ 𐔌՞ ܸ.ˬ.ܸ՞𐦯
